originalTitle: Halo: Campaign Evolved | Cinematic Story Trailer
content: After crash landing on a mysterious ringworld known as Halo, the Master Chief is tasked with defending humanity against an overwhelming alien force: the Covenant. With the help of his AI companion Cortana, the Chief must uncover Halo’s dark secrets and fight to avert the annihilation of all life in the galaxy. Halo: Campaign Evolved is coming to Xbox Series X|S, PC, and PlayStation 5 on July 28. Pre-order the Premium Edition or Collector’s Edition today and get up to 5 days early access beginning July 23, 2026. chineseTitle: | 光 | 环 | ： | 战 | 役 | 演 | 变 | | | | 电 | 影 | 故 | 事 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseContent: 迫降在一个名为光环的神秘环形世界后，士官长的任务是保护人类免受压倒性的外星力量：星盟的攻击。在人工智能同伴 Cortana 的帮助下，士官长必须揭开光环的黑暗秘密，并努力避免银河系中所有生命的毁灭。 《光环：战役进化》将于 7 月 28 日登陆 Xbox Series X|S、PC 和 PlayStation 5。立即预订高级版或收藏版，即可从 2026 年 7 月 23 日起提前 5 天体验。立即预订！ aka.ms/HCEBuyNow #Halo #Xbox #HaloCE _____________________________________________ 关注 #Halo 了解最新更新： - Instagram：https://instagram.com/Halo - TikTok：https://www.tiktok.com/@halo - Facebook：https://facebook.com/Halo - Twitch：https://twitch.tv/Halo - Discord：https://discord.gg/Halo - X/Twitter： https://twitter.com/halo - 主题：https://threads.com/@halo - Bluesky：https://bsky.app/profile/halo.gg - 网站：https://halowaypoint.com Halo 支持 - 网站：https://aka.ms/HaloSupport - X/Twitter：https://twitter.com/HaloSupport
